BaseFindingItem.description:
Required base for ALL per-CSP finding list item models.

Field naming rules (ADR-006):
  - ``resource_uid``  — NOT arn / instance_id / compartment_id
  - ``account_id``    — NOT subscription_id / project_id
  - ``region``        — NOT availability_zone
  - ``provider``      — required on every item; drives CSP icon in the UI
  - ``provider_metadata`` — opaque dict for CSP-specific fields that don't
                            normalize across providers

Credential fields are declared ``exclude=True`` so they are never
serialized into the HTTP response.
BaseFindingItem.title: BaseFindingItem

SeverityCounts.description:
Severity breakdown for a group of findings.

``by_provider`` is populated only for multi-CSP aggregation pages
(dashboard, compliance, risk).  Single-CSP pages leave it empty.
SeverityCounts.title: SeverityCounts

BFFErrorResponse.description:
Structured error envelope for all BFF 4xx/5xx responses.

Every handler that catches an upstream failure must return this model
(never a raw dict or a plain string).
BFFErrorResponse.title: BFFErrorResponse

PaginatedList.description:
Generic paginated response container.

Use as the ``items`` field type in any view that returns a scrollable
table rather than a fixed-size KPI aggregate.

Example:
    class MisconfigResponse(BaseModel):
        items: PaginatedList[MisconfigItem]
PaginatedList.title: PaginatedList

ScanRunRef.description: Lightweight reference to a completed scan run.
ScanRunRef.title: ScanRunRef

KpiItem.description: Single KPI tile rendered by the UI.
KpiItem.title: KpiItem

KpiItem.description: Single KPI tile rendered by the UI.
KpiItem.title: KpiItem

KpiGroup.description: Named group of KPI tiles (one card on the page).
KpiGroup.title: KpiGroup

PageTab.description: Single tab in the page-context tab strip.
PageTab.title: PageTab

PageTab.description: Single tab in the page-context tab strip.
PageTab.title: PageTab

PageContext.description: Standard pageContext envelope produced by `_page_context.py` helpers.
PageContext.title: PageContext

_BaseViewResponse.description:
Base for all BFF view responses.

extra="allow" preserves the dozens of legacy / camelCase / snake_case
fields each page returns without enumerating every one. The validator
enforces credential-key denylist across the entire serialized output.
_BaseViewResponse.title: _BaseViewResponse

EngineExtensions.description:
Plugin slot — engines may register additional tab payloads.

Allows extra fields, but the denylist validator blocks
prototype-pollution-style key names.
EngineExtensions.title: EngineExtensions

EngineExtensions.description:
Plugin slot — engines may register additional tab payloads.

Allows extra fields, but the denylist validator blocks
prototype-pollution-style key names.
EngineExtensions.title: EngineExtensions

StandardColumns.description:
The mandatory 14 columns echoed from every finding table.

`credentialRef` and `credentialType` are excluded from serialization
via Field(exclude=True). The model_validator on FindingDetailResponse
enforces the same rule across the full payload as defense-in-depth.
StandardColumns.title: StandardColumns
